mining.power_targets.title: Configure power range
mining.power_targets.range_description: The cluster controller may regulate this miner only within this range.
mining.power_targets.overclock_descripti: This maximum exceeds the miner's reported default. Power draw, noise, temperature and wear may increase significantly.
mining.power_targets.heat_description: Check cooling and airflow before raising the power limit further.
mining.power_targets.electrical_descript: Standard outlets, wiring or power strips can be critically overloaded under this continuous load, especially when other consumers share the circuit. The circuit, breaker, cable gauge and connection must be professionally verified.
mining.power_targets.electrical_acknowle: I understand the electrical and thermal risk. The installation has been checked for this continuous load and I accept responsibility.
mining.power_targets.controller_hint: This change constrains the cluster controller. A running cluster applies it in the next unlocked control cycle; active runtime and power locks remain intact.
mining.power_targets.unsupported: This miner does not support dynamic power scaling.
mining.power_targets.error: The power range could not be saved.
mining.miners.empty: No miners are assigned to this cluster yet.

cluster.simulator.title: Controller simulator

cluster.simulator.disclaimer: Dry run: conditions, mode changes, and power targets use the same DSL engine. No hardware commands are sent; locks and allocation are estimated.
cluster.simulator.preset.sunny_descripti: Stable PV production and a well-charged battery.
cluster.simulator.preset.volatile_descri: Fast cloud changes and volatile surplus power.
cluster.simulator.preset.low_battery_des: Tests protection and shutdown rules with a low battery.
